findings.description: The North Carolina state seal/logo image present in the PDF header is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the North Carolina state seal centered at the top of the page. The HTML rendering has no image/seal.

findings.description: The RE: subject block formatting differs - in the PDF it is indented under 'RE:' label with the subject, county, and river basin as a structured block. In HTML it is rendered as large heading-style text spanning the full width.
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'RE:' with indented lines (Proposed Alamance Quarry..., Alamance County, Cape Fear River Basin) as regular-sized text. HTML renders these as very large heading text separated by a horizontal rule.

findings.description: The RE: subject line content is rendered as prominent headings in HTML when it is regular body text in the PDF, significantly changing the visual hierarchy.
findings.evidence: PDF: RE subject is in same font size as body text. HTML: RE subject rendered as large H1/H2-level headings that dominate the page.
